description: Authoritative registry of all calc_version values. Every calc_version must be registered here with its logic description and introducing PR. Changes to calculation logic files without a registry update fail the calc-version-registry gate.

calc_versions.label: baseline
calc_versions.description: Initial calculation version. Deals store assumptions and outputs via deal_inputs and deal_outputs tables. No formula logic implemented server-side yet; calc_version tracks schema generation only.

calc_versions.label: 9.7 token lifetime invariant
calc_versions.description: 9.7: create_share_token_v1 recreated with 90-day maximum lifetime guard. Migration references calc_version incidentally via deals join — no calc logic changed.

calc_versions.label: 9.5 token cardinality guard
calc_versions.description: 9.5: create_share_token_v1 recreated with cardinality guard. Migration references calc_version incidentally via deals join in lookup path — no calc logic changed.

calc_versions.label: 9.4 token format validation
calc_versions.description: 9.4: lookup_share_token_v1 recreated with format guard before hashing. Migration joins deals to return calc_version in success response — incidental token reference, no calc logic changed.

calc_versions.label: 8.4 hash-at-rest
calc_versions.description: 8.4: share token lookup RPC references calc_version in SELECT/return. No calc logic changed. Hash-at-rest conversion only.

calc_versions.label: 10.8.4 deal health computation
calc_versions.description: 10.8.4: list_deals_v1 recreated with health_color field. Migration references calc_version incidentally in json_build_object return - no calc logic changed. Health computation derives from updated_at and stage only.
